title: S-Corp Shareholder Agreement
description: Agreement governing S-Corporation stock transfer restrictions, S-status preservation, and shareholder rights.
whatsCovered: Preservation of Subchapter S tax classification
Right of first refusal (ROFR) for corporation shares
Shareholder voting agreements and board representation
S-Corp dividend payout coordination for shareholder taxes
whenToUse: Use this agreement for an S-Corporation to prevent shareholders from selling stock to ineligible entities (which would destroy S-Corp tax status).

clauses.heading: S-CORP SHAREHOLDER AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the S-Corp Shareholder Agreement. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. S-Corp Status Preservation
clauses.body: Shareholders hold {share_count} stock. Shareholders agree to vote in alignment to preserve Subchapter S classification. Tax distribution rate is set at {tax_distribution_pct}%.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
